title: hibbertia mulligana
intro: Hibbertia mulligana, also known as Yellow Pea Flower, is a small, flowering shrub native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and protect the skin. The leaves and flowers of Hibbertia mulligana have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and inflammation, due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as salves, creams, and tinctures, to take advantage of its health benefits, including wound healing and skin protection.
